extra.message: Unsanitized input from an HTTP parameter flows into jinja2.Template, where it is used to construct a template that gets rendered. This may result in a Server-Side Template Injection vulnerability.
Avoid hardcoding values that are meant to be secret. Found a hardcoded string used in here.
jinja2.Template is called with no autoescape argument (autoescaping is disabled by default). This increases the risk of Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) attacks.
